description.value: Price 35,320 gp; Slot none; CL 13th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura strong transmutation DESCRIPTION This +2 countering dueling rapier is particularly well balanced, and features a stout steel ball on the pommel. Three times per day, the wielder can make a surprise melee attack with the pommel as a swift action, as if proficient with the attack and at her normal attack bonus. The attack deals 1d6+2 points of bludgeoning damage, and the critical multiplier is 20/×2. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 17,820 gp; Feats Combat Reflexes, Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells cat’s grace, daze
